scripts.build:electron: vite build --mode main && vite build --mode preload && vite build
scripts.build: pnpm run build:native && pnpm run build:electron
scripts.package:dir: pnpm run clean:build && pnpm run build && electron-builder --dir --config electron-builder.yml --publish=never
scripts.test:packaged: pnpm run test:packaged-smoke && pnpm run test:packaged-real-workflow
scripts.test:packaged-real-workflow: pnpm run package:dir && playwright test tests/real-workflow.spec.ts --grep "packaged"
scripts.test:packaged-smoke: pnpm run package:dir && playwright test tests/packaged-smoke.spec.ts
scripts.test:product-user-journey: pnpm run build && playwright test tests/product-user-journey.spec.ts
scripts.test:real-workflow: pnpm run build && playwright test tests/real-workflow.spec.ts --grep "dev"
scripts.test:runtime-diagnostics: pnpm run build && playwright test tests/runtime-diagnostics.spec.ts
scripts.test:workspace: pnpm run build && playwright test tests/workspace.spec.ts
